subject: How Indiana districts can fund AI with the 2026 Digital Learning Grant
previewText: See how districts can apply for up to $50,000 to fund AI.
module-4-0-0:
Hi {{ personalization_token('contact.firstname', 'fellow educator') }},

 

Indiana's 2026 Digital Learning Grant is open now. Districts can apply for up to $50,000 to fund tools that help student outcomes.

 

Are you exploring how AI can help instruction in your district? Do you want to know how this grant can help fund it? We're hosting a short session to walk through how districts are approaching it.

 

SchoolAI + the Indiana Digital Learning Grant: Supporting Your Application

📅 Tuesday, March 17 | 4:00 - 5:00 PM ET [RSVP Here]

📅 Monday, March 23 | 4:00 - 5:00 PM ET [RSVP Here]

 

In this session, we'll cover:

  • How SchoolAI fits the IDOE AI vendor requirements
  • How districts use AI to help student outcomes in literacy and math
  • How educators use real-time data insights to guide instruction
  • A district story on using SchoolAI to support student learning

 

Save your spot today. Spots are LIMITED.

 

Grant application deadline: April 6, 2026

 

We hope you can join us!

 

The SchoolAI Team
